title: ActionRequest
description: Represents a request for an AI system to perform a high-risk action on behalf of a human or organization. This is the entry point of the RIO Receipt Protocol chain.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this action request. Used to link all downstream records (recommendation, approval, execution, receipt) back to this request.

requested_by.description: Identifier of the human or system that initiated this request. May be a user ID, email address, or service account identifier.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the request was created.

action_type.description: A short, machine-readable label describing the category of action being requested.

target.description: The resource or entity the action will be applied to.

id.description: The identifier of the specific target resource.

parameters.description: Action-specific parameters. The structure of this object depends on the action_type. All parameters that will be used during execution must be declared here at request time.

business_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this action is being requested. Optional but recommended for audit trail clarity.

risk_level.description: The assessed risk level of this action. Determines the approval threshold and authorization requirements under the governing policy.

policy_context.description: Optional reference to the policy or rule set under which this request is being evaluated.

policy_id.description: Identifier of the active policy document at the time of the request.
